name: Altos de Marbella Residences
description: A refined collection of elevated residences designed around open terraces, sea light and quiet coastal living.
seoDescription: Altos de Marbella Residences, a curated Marbella East new development preview with elevated sea-facing residences from EUR 1,250,000.
twitterDescription: Marbella East elevated coastline new development preview from EUR 1,250,000.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Nueva Living, I would like to speak with an advisor about Altos de Marbella Residences.

card.label: Marbella East
card.description: A refined collection of elevated residences designed around open terraces, sea light and quiet coastal living.

hero.alt: Elevated sea-facing terrace with private pool and Mediterranean outlook

architecture.alt: Open-plan residence connecting lounge, terrace and private pool
architecture.caption: Indoor-outdoor continuity

privateViewing.alt: Private pool terrace at sunset with coastal views

quickFacts: Current price list confirmed before viewing

copy: Altos de Marbella Residences is presented as a calm coastal collection for buyers who want space, privacy and a more architectural relationship with the Mediterranean landscape.
The project is intentionally positioned away from the noise of the beachfront, using elevation, terraces and broad glazing to create a quiet, view-led residential rhythm.

why.copy: This project is suited for buyers seeking a calm, design-led residence with strong lifestyle fundamentals and a long-term value logic that is tied to elevation, outdoor space and Marbella East connectivity.
points: Buyers who want privacy, design quality and a quieter coastal rhythm without losing access to Marbella services.
The project prioritises terrace-led living, sea light and elevation rather than a dense beachfront positioning.
Marbella East offers beach proximity, residential calm and practical access to the wider Costa del Sol.
Unit mix, views and payment structures can change quickly, so current developer material matters before shortlisting.

copy: The design language is restrained: clean horizontal lines, protected outdoor rooms and generous glazing that allows terraces to become a natural extension of the living space.
Rather than over-styling, the architecture relies on proportion, shade, outlook and material calm. The result is a residence that feels intentional without becoming loud.
highlights: Large-format openings designed around light and sea orientation.
Terrace-led planning with soft transitions between interior and exterior.
Warm natural textures balanced by crisp architectural volumes.
Private pool and garden options across selected residences.

residences.headlineHtml: Three residential expressions, one quiet coastal logic
residences.copy: Each residence type is framed around outdoor space, privacy and long-term livability. Final sizes, layouts and current availability should be confirmed from the developer material pack.

items.name: Penthouses
features: Upper-level privacy and open coastal outlooks.
Large terraces arranged for dining and lounging.
Selected units with private pool or plunge-pool options.

items.name: Villas
features: Family-scale interior planning with entertainment space.
Designed for extended stays and permanent use.

items.name: Garden Residences
features: Ground-connected living with generous private exteriors.
Calm garden outlooks and direct terrace access.

privateViewing.copy: Experience the atmosphere, sequence and spatial character before requesting the full material package.
insights: Open glazing, terrace continuity and calm material transitions.
Garden residences, penthouses and villas with different outdoor-space profiles.
Designed for buyers balancing privacy, coastal access and design-led daily living.
Request the project file to confirm layouts, availability and private viewing options.

lifestyle.headlineHtml: A quieter way to live near Marbella
lifestyle.copy: Altos de Marbella is shaped for buyers who want the coast close, but not constantly around them. The lifestyle is terrace-led, design-led and calm, with Marbella town, beach clubs, golf and services within a short drive.
panels: Outdoor rooms become the primary living layer, arranged for morning light, evening dining and long coastal views.
The hillside setting gives separation from heavier coastal movement while keeping the address connected.
A restrained material palette and clear planning support long stays, family use and lock-up-and-leave living.

location.headlineHtml: Marbella East, held slightly above the coast
location.copy: Marbella East is valued for its established residential character, beach proximity and softer rhythm compared with the denser central coastline. The elevated position adds privacy and view potential while keeping daily life practical.

investment.copy: The investment case should be reviewed through timing, developer access, unit selection and the scarcity of elevated sea-view new development. No return is assumed or promised.
cards: Earlier-phase access can provide better unit choice and payment structure visibility, but should be assessed against delivery risk and developer credentials.
Direct material, current availability and accurate reservation conditions matter more than public listing summaries.
Elevation, outdoor space, specification and micro-location help frame long-term resilience without relying on exaggerated yield claims.
The residence profile suits buyers balancing personal lifestyle use with selective rental potential, subject to rules and market conditions.

trustDossier.copy: Before a viewing or reservation, the important details should be understood clearly: developer access, legal sequence, document availability and delivery context.
cards: Developer profile, construction status and specification notes are reviewed against the latest project material before recommendations are made.
Reservation process, payment structure and legal due diligence should be understood before committing to a preferred residence.
Delivery timing, warranties and handover assumptions are treated as verification points, not marketing statements.
Nueva Living helps structure the comparison so buyers can decide from clear project context rather than listing noise.

items: Receive brochure, floorplans, current availability and price context before shortlisting.
Compare residence types, orientation, payment structure and suitability against your brief.
Arrange an in-person or guided digital viewing once the right units are identified.
Confirm reservation terms, legal support and latest developer documentation before proceeding.

projectFile.copy: Project documents are shared privately so that pricing, availability and technical material remain current and relevant to the buyer brief.
documents: Latest released units and guide pricing
Site relationship, orientation and amenity context

availability.copy: Current availability changes frequently. Selected residences, updated price list, floorplans and payment structure are confirmed privately before any viewing or reservation step.

enquiry.copy: Request current availability, floorplans or a private viewing. We will respond with the relevant project file and advisory context.
enquiry.message: I would like to receive the private project file for Altos de Marbella Residences, including current availability, price list, floorplans and viewing options.
enquiry.note: Private request context: Altos de Marbella Residences.
enquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. Your Altos de Marbella request has been noted for private follow-up.
